creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Applying this yields:

fc$ svn patch /tmp/baz
U         bazel/Makefile

Skipped 'bazel/files/patch-src_main_cpp_blaze__util__freebsd.cc'

Summary of conflicts:

Any idea ?
